title: jurinea korotkovae
intro: Jurinea korotkovae is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae and is also known as Korotkov's jurinea. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant has been reported to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and possessing antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Traditionally, Jurinea korotkovae is prepared as an infusion or a tincture for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
